prompts.prompt: Create a 5-slide pitch deck for an AI-powered customer support startup targeting venture capital investors. Include: problem statement, solution, market size, team, and funding ask.
Design a 4-slide marketing overview for a new SaaS product launch. Include value proposition, key features, pricing tiers, and call to action.
Build an 8-slide training presentation on Python basics. Cover: intro, variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, and summary.
Create a 10-slide quarterly financial review. Include revenue trends, expense breakdown, profit margins, key metrics, and forward guidance.
Design a 6-slide product roadmap presentation. Show Q1-Q3 priorities, key features planned, timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics.
Build a 3-slide overview of global climate data. Include temperature trends, carbon emissions, and projected impacts with visual emphasis.
Create a 7-slide company culture presentation for new hires. Cover values, mission, team structure, benefits, onboarding, and career growth.
Design a 12-slide technical architecture overview. Include system components, data flow, API design, security considerations, and scalability approach.
Build a 4-slide conference talk proposal. Include abstract, key takeaways, audience level, and speaker bio.
Create slides about digital transformation. Keep it simple and professional.
Create a 5-slide detailed technical specification document for a real-time data processing system. Each slide should be comprehensive with multiple bullet points.
Design a 6-slide visual portfolio of sustainable architecture projects. Emphasize imagery, minimal text, professional layout.

Create a 4-slide presentation with titles like: 'Comprehensive Analysis of Multi-Dimensional Market Penetration Strategies in Emerging Technology Sectors' and 'Revolutionary Approaches to Sustainable Business Operations and Long-Term Environmental Impact Reduction'
Build a detailed 15-slide sales deck for enterprise software. Include problem, solution, differentiation, social proof, pricing, ROI, timeline, team, testimonials, and next steps.
Create an 8-slide annual report for a nonprofit. Cover mission impact, programs, beneficiaries served, financials, partnerships, and goals for next year.
Design a 6-slide workshop agenda on AI Ethics. Include overview, three main topics, interactive elements, and resources.
Create an 8-slide product demo walkthrough. Show interface, key workflows, integrations, performance metrics, and pricing.
Build a 10-slide research presentation on machine learning applications in healthcare. Include background, methodology, results, implications, and limitations.
